title: Poor as a Church Mouse
writer: Ladislas Fodor, Heinz Goldberg, Felix Salten

plot: General Director von Ulrich is determined to introduce the American working pace at his office. The first to get fired is his secretary; she's replaced by stenographer Sui Sachs. On a business trip to Paris, feelings evolve on bot...
